steps.t: Legolas has returned to Echad Taerdim, the Ranger camp in Cirith Ungol. You should talk to Legolas.
Felgúr has been taken prisoner, and is being kept in Echad Taerdim. You should talk to Felgúr.
Felgúr has asked you to propose a deal to Mablung on his behalf. You should talk to Mablung in Echad Taerdim.
Atli Spider-bane is resting at Echad Taerdim. You should see how Atli is faring after Rûkhor's assault.
Legolas can be found in Echad Taerdim, the Ranger camp in Cirith Ungol. You should talk to Legolas.
